meaning: n.(照相机等的)自动聚焦装置,自动对光装置adj.自动聚集的,自动对光的
examples: Your camcorder should have these basic features: autofocus, playback facility, zoom lens.
Slower - in some cases much slower - autofocus.
Notice two of the new attributes, required and autofocus.
Manual Focus is available for use when autofocus or focus lock is not desired.
Tapping anywhere in the viewfinder enables touch-to-focus, tapping and holding lets you select the autofocus mode.
